reconstructed_sketch: From chapter context, one would predict 2.29 to be another do-not-grieve argument continuing the imperishable theme. One would NOT predict the meter shift to trishtubh, the four-link chain seer-speaker-hearer-knower, or the engineering analog grounded in payments-platform tacit knowledge with the specific p99-wobble-at-2:14am detail. verse_specific_signal: The four-link chain with the gap between hearing and knowing, mapped onto the engineering chain of dashboard-watcher / runbook-writer / new-hire-reader / actually-on-call-after-three-years. This is the contribution 2.29 makes that no other verse in the block makes — and the user's design note explicitly identifies 2.29 as the most engineering-resonant verse for this reason.

overlap_with_other_verses.explanation: 2.28's counter_example forwards the undocumented-tribal-knowledge case to 2.29; the cross-reference does load-bearing work because 2.29 is the verse that handles that case.

verdict_reason: The verse contributes a uniquely identifiable signal — the gap between hearing and knowing — that no other verse in the chapter contributes. The engineering layer leans into this distinctiveness rather than softening it.
